title: Better Borderless Glass
description: Borderless Glass, but it works with any resource pack! No mods required!
body:
Better Borderless Glass is borderless glass, but it works with any resource pack!\
For best compatibility put this on top of other resource packs in case they change models (but rarely glass packs do!)\
_Side Note: Unfortunately due to the way Minecraft renders glass panes, they are not yet in the pack, I am doing my best to fix it, but for now just put a normal borderless glass pack underneath. It is feasible just the borders still show in the corners. I hope you understand. =D_

<details>
<summary>How it works(for creators)</summary>
This pack uses models to apply the borderless parts of glass over where the borders should go, using the default glass textures, meaning when a resource modifies them, above or below this pack, it will render the borderless glass of the custom one on.
</details>

Features:
- ⚡Optimized — the pack has been optimized, bringing no performance impact whatsoever and can even improve it in some cases due to there being less textures
- 🧽Clean — the pack has the exact same look and style of a normal borderless glass texture pack, with no texture bleeding or any ugly parts!
- 🍦Vanilla-friendly — the pack works on full Vanilla Minecraft, no OptiFine or any mods required!
- 💯Full support — works with every glass color, changing the item as well!
Enjoy!
